tools.name: docs_architect
tools.purpose: Execute a Gold Standard documentation overhaul by reading project files and returning a comprehensive generation prompt.
tools.title: Documentation Architect

tools.name: skill_creator
tools.purpose: Generate skill scaffolding, directories, and a SKILL.md template for a new skill.
tools.title: Skill Creator

tools.name: resolve_workflow
tools.purpose: Run a semantic search over agent skills and inject the top 1-3 matches plus prompts and guidelines into the response.
tools.title: Resolve Workflow

tools.name: search_skills
tools.purpose: Search the EVOKORE-MCP skill library by keyword across names, descriptions, tags, and categories.
tools.title: Search Skills

tools.name: get_skill_help
tools.purpose: Retrieve full documentation, internal instructions, and intended use-cases for a specific skill.
tools.title: Get Skill Help

tools.name: discover_tools
tools.purpose: Search and list tools available in the current session; in dynamic mode this activates matched tools for the session.
tools.title: Discover Tools

tools.name: proxy_server_status
tools.purpose: Inspect the aggregated child-server registry including server status, tool counts, and recent health metadata.
tools.title: Proxy Server Status

tools.name: refresh_skills
tools.purpose: Rescan the SKILLS directory and refresh the in-memory skill index without restarting the server.
tools.title: Refresh Skills Index

tools.name: fetch_skill
tools.purpose: Download a skill from a remote URL into the local SKILLS directory with optional SHA-256 checksum verification.
tools.title: Fetch Remote Skill

tools.name: list_registry
tools.purpose: List skills available from configured remote registries defined in mcp.config.json under skillRegistries.
tools.title: List Registry Skills

tools.name: execute_skill
tools.purpose: Execute code blocks from a skill in a sandboxed subprocess with output capture, timeout, and resource limits.
tools.title: Execute Skill Steps

tools.name: describe_tool
tools.purpose: Return full schemas for the requested tool names; the bootstrap path when EVOKORE_TOOL_SCHEMA_MODE=deferred strips schemas.
tools.title: Describe Tool

tools.name: get_telemetry
tools.purpose: Return aggregate telemetry metrics (tool call counts, error rates, session counts, latency). Requires EVOKORE_TELEMETRY=true.
tools.title: Get Telemetry Metrics

tools.name: reset_telemetry
tools.purpose: Reset all telemetry metrics to zero, clearing both the in-memory state and the persisted metrics file.
tools.title: Reset Telemetry Metrics

tools.name: reload_plugins
tools.purpose: Reload all plugins from the plugins directory and pick up tool changes during a live session.
tools.title: Reload Plugins

tools.name: nav_get_map
tools.purpose: Scan a file for @AI:NAV anchors and return a structural map (sections, insert points, warnings) without returning file content.
tools.title: Get Navigation Anchor Map

tools.name: nav_read_anchor
tools.purpose: Read a bounded window of lines centered on a named @AI:NAV anchor without loading the full file.
tools.title: Read Navigation Anchor Window

tools.name: session_context_health
tools.purpose: Report current session context pressure with cache-token counts, cost per turn, and whether /compact is recommended.
tools.title: Session Context Health

tools.name: session_analyze_replay
tools.purpose: Analyze EVOKORE session replay JSONL files to produce tool frequency stats and detect retry signals.
tools.title: Analyze Session Replay

tools.name: session_work_ratio
tools.purpose: Compute the ratio of non-empty evidence entries to total replay entries to flag retry storms and low-yield sessions.
tools.title: Session Work Ratio

tools.name: session_trust_report
tools.purpose: Return per-agent trust scores, tiers, and multipliers for the current session.
tools.title: Session Trust Report

tools.name: claim_acquire
tools.purpose: Acquire an exclusive resource claim for an agent (file, task, dataset) with a configurable TTL.
tools.title: Acquire Resource Claim

tools.name: claim_release
tools.purpose: Release a resource claim held by an agent. Idempotent and returns false if claim not found or not owned.
tools.title: Release Resource Claim

tools.name: claim_list
tools.purpose: List all active resource claims with staleness info (expired, processDead). Read-only.
tools.title: List Resource Claims

tools.name: claim_sweep
tools.purpose: Sweep and remove expired or dead-process claims. Returns count of swept vs alive claims.
tools.title: Sweep Stale Claims

tools.name: memory_store
tools.purpose: Store a value in agent memory keyed by session and key with optional tags; supports kind-based default TTL.
tools.title: Store Agent Memory

tools.name: memory_search
tools.purpose: Search agent memory by key pattern, tags, or kind filter. Returns matching entries newest-first.
tools.title: Search Agent Memory

tools.name: memory_list
tools.purpose: List all active (non-expired) memory entries for a given session. Read-only.
tools.title: List Agent Memory

tools.name: fleet_spawn
tools.purpose: Spawn a child process and register it in the fleet with an agentId; detaches into its own process group on POSIX.
tools.title: Spawn Fleet Agent

tools.name: fleet_claim
tools.purpose: Associate a running fleet agent with a resource name and mark the resource as claimed.
tools.title: Claim Fleet Resource

tools.name: fleet_release
tools.purpose: Kill a fleet agent's full process tree and mark it released. Uses taskkill on Windows and process-group SIGKILL on POSIX.
tools.title: Release Fleet Agent

tools.name: fleet_status
tools.purpose: Return the status and liveness of one fleet agent (when agentId is provided) or every registered agent.
tools.title: Fleet Status

tools.name: orchestration_start
tools.purpose: Start a multi-agent orchestrated run via FleetManager and ClaimsManager with sequential rollback on failure.
tools.title: Start Orchestrated Run

tools.name: orchestration_stop
tools.purpose: Stop an orchestrated run, release every agent process tree, and free every held resource claim.
tools.title: Stop Orchestrated Run

tools.name: orchestration_status
tools.purpose: Return status for one run (when runId provided) or all runs and trigger a liveness probe that can mark stalled runs degraded.
tools.title: Orchestration Status

tools.name: worker_dispatch
tools.purpose: Dispatch a non-blocking background worker (test_run, repo_analysis, security_scan, benchmark); returns a workerId for polling.
tools.title: Dispatch Background Worker

tools.name: worker_context
tools.purpose: Get the current status and results of a dispatched worker (pending, running, complete, error) plus persisted output.
tools.title: Get Worker Context
